codeReview.summary: The feature adds SVG icon cases for every newly registered platform ID, ships matching PlatformIcon tests, and replaces the Tauri bundle icons with a custom Catppuccin-themed asset set referenced by `tauri.conf.json`. The current source and generated icon files satisfy VAL-PEXP-004 and VAL-PEXP-005, but the feature commit also bundled unrelated Discover-scanner scaffolding and a global ESLint rule tweak that are outside the platform-expansion scope.

issues.description: Commit `54a24c8` stages unrelated Discover feature scaffolding (`src/pages/DiscoverView.tsx`, `src/components/discover/*`, `src/stores/discoverStore.ts`, route wiring, and the underscore-unused ESLint relaxation) alongside the platform-icon work, which makes milestone-scoped review and rollback harder than necessary.
issues.suggestedFix: Keep future feature commits limited to the intended milestone, or split unrelated Discover/lint work into its own feature commit before landing.

summary: Pass with a scope-isolation suggestion. Commit `54a24c8` delivers the requested platform/app icons, but it also carries unrelated Discover and lint changes that should be split in future commits.
